summary.single_next_implementation_justified_by_: Missing fulfillment handoff that carries a paid client into fix_in_progress and binds the fulfillment packet / proof chain on the existing next_action_execution path.

evidence: introduced as StaffordOS next action engine v1
router binding manifest names it next_action_owner
task resolver binds next_action_execution to node staffordos/clients/next_action_engine_v1.mjs

generates_proof_packages.note: Concrete proof-loop generator exists, but it is Abando-oriented and not proven as the ShopiFixer paid-sprint proof generator.

final_answers.who_owns_fulfillment: Intended: staffordos/clients/next_action_engine_v1.mjs; runtime-proven full owner: none yet
final_answers.what_generates_proof: No proven ShopiFixer runtime owner; closest proof-loop generator is staffordos/proof_loop/merchant_proof_loop_completion_pack_v1.js
